name: Halibut and Cucumber Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the shredded cucumber with sour cream, Miracle Whip, chives, lemon juice, 1/4 teaspoon salt, and a dash of pepper. Mix well and chill until serving time.
2. Place the halibut in a well-greased wire grill basket.
3. In a saucepan, melt the butter. Stir in 1 tablespoon salt and 1/8 teaspoon pepper.
4. Grill the halibut over medium-hot coals for 5-8 minutes, depending on thickness of steaks. Brush with the butter mixture occasionally.
5. Turn the halibut and baste with the remaining butter mixture.
6. Grill the halibut until it flakes easily with a fork, an additional 5-8 minutes.
7. Sprinkle the halibut with paprika and serve with chilled cucumber sauce.
